settings.main_headline: Har cheez success se start nahi hoti.
settings.subheadline: Kuch cheezein silently build hoti hain… bina kisi ko bataye.
settings.secondary_line: TZCP ek brand nahi hai. Ye ek phase hai — jisme log kuch apna build kar rahe hote hain.
settings.mystery_line: Shayad tum bhi us phase me ho.
settings.story_line_1: Kabhi socha hai… sab kuch shuru kahan se hota hai?
settings.story_line_2: Na hype hota hai, na applause.
settings.story_line_3: Bas kaam hota hai. Raat ke 2 baje bhi.
settings.story_line_4: Hum usi phase ke liye kuch bana rahe hain.
settings.signup_heading: Early access ke liye join karo
settings.signup_text: Jo samajh gaya, woh pehle aayega.
settings.footer_line: Story abhi shuru nahi hui. Bas signal diya hai.
